title: Flame Grilled Uruguayan Beef Skewers
description: A classic Uruguayan dish featuring tender beef, earthy flavors, and a hint of lemongrass, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this recipe is low in carbs and big on flavor, with a dramatic flambe finish.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place a lemongrass stalk on each skewer, near the top.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef is cooked to desired doneness.
Remove the skewers from the grill and place on a heat-proof surface.
Pour the rum over the skewers and carefully ignite with a match or lighter.
Let the flames burn for about 30 seconds, then extinguish and serve immediately.
